name: rival-search-mcp-skills
description: Agent skill and CLI helpers for using RivalSearchMCP research tools from Codex. Includes workflows, command references, and a standalone CLI for the hosted MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Agent skill package for RivalSearchMCP. Provides research workflows, tool references, and a self-contained CLI for using the hosted RivalSearchMCP server without manual MCP setup.
defaultPrompt: Use the RivalSearch skill to research a topic.
Show RivalSearch CLI examples for web research.
